name: Indoor Tee - Lincoln
address: 1433 Dahlberg Dr Suite F, Lincoln, NE 68512
about: Indoor Tee is an indoor golf simulation facility that uses Trackman technology to provide a realistic golfing experience. The venue offers both hourly bookings and various membership tiers, catering to golfers of all skill levels. With simulators featuring elite virtual courses like PGA National and St. Andrews, it provides an immersive practice and play environment. The facility is designed for focused golf practice without the distractions of outdoor elements, offering detailed performance analytics to help players refine their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Trackman iO dual-radar technology for precise swing and ball flight analysis
Access to elite virtual golf courses like PGA National and St. Andrews with stunning realism
Flexible pricing options including hourly bookings, multi-hour packages, and membership plans
No caddies or divots, allowing for pure, focused golf practice
Real-time performance insights without requiring professional coaching

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on-site
No mention of alcohol service on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual-radar technology providing detailed analytics on club speed, ball speed, launch angle and more

faq.answer: The content doesn't explicitly state whether club rentals are available or if you need to bring your own clubs.

faq.answer: The venue doesn't mention any food or drink service, and there are no restrictions mentioned on bringing outside items.

faq.answer: The content doesn't specify the duration required to play 18 holes, though it mentions 4-hour and 10-hour booking options.

faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to be kid-friendly, with content showing family activities and a focus on accessible golf for all skill levels.
